---
title: "Announcement about Midterm, MAD345 Mining II, on November 18" 
description: "Rules"
date: 2020-11-16T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---



Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` MAD345 - MIDTERM 1

Your midterm exam will be available at [evdekal.hacettepe.edu.tr](https://evdekal.hacettepe.edu.tr). It will be available on November 18, 2020 at 09h15 until 10h15.

We will be having discussion about exam rules via Zoom, prior to the exam, which will be starting at 09h00 as usual, like we did at lectures.

See you at November 18, 2020 at 09h00.

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`
